summary: Multi-city hotel selection bug fix fully verified. Bug: When same city (e.g., Tbilisi) appears multiple times in a trip, selecting a hotel for one Tbilisi stay would auto-select the same hotel for the other. Fix: Changed selectedHotels key from city name to cityIndex. Test: Created trip with Tbilisi (1 night) -> Gudauri (1 night) -> Tbilisi (1 night). Selected Horizont Hotel for first Tbilisi only. Result: Second Tbilisi correctly shows 'No Hotel Selected' - each city stay has independent hotel selection.

multi_city_trip_creation.details: Created trip with 3 cities: Tbilisi (1 night), Gudauri (1 night), Tbilisi (1 night). Used + Add Another City button (data-testid='add-city-button') to add cities.

three_separate_hotel_sections.details: Trip Builder shows 3 separate 'Stay in X 1 night' sections with independent Add Hotel buttons (data-testid: add-hotel-0, add-hotel-1, add-hotel-2)

independent_hotel_selection_for_same_cit.details: Selected Horizont Hotel for first Tbilisi (index 0). Second Tbilisi (index 2) correctly shows 'No Hotel Selected' with its own Add Hotel button. Bug fix confirmed working.
independent_hotel_selection_for_same_cit.evidence: change-hotel-0 exists (hotel selected), add-hotel-1 and add-hotel-2 exist (no hotels selected)

trip_summary_shows_correct_cities.details: Trip Summary shows: Tbilisi 1 night, Gudauri 1 night, Tbilisi 1 night - correct city names and nights

hotel_selection_modal.details: Hotel Options Modal opens with 'View all stay options in Tbilisi', 'No stay required', and search. Hotel list shows Horizont Hotel Tbilisi and Iveria Inn Hotel.

room_selection.details: Selected Standard Triple Room for Horizont Hotel. Room shows: 1 x Standard Triple Room, 3 Single, Breakfast included, AED 257/night

change_room_change_hotel_buttons.details: Change Room (data-testid='change-room-0') and Change Hotel (data-testid='change-hotel-0') buttons visible for hotel section with selected hotel

pricing_calculation.details: Total price shows AED 257 (correct for 1 night at AED 257/night). Hotels in Price Breakdown: AED 257

critical_code_review_comments: TripBuilder.jsx line 183: handleChangeHotel(cityIndex) correctly uses cityIndex instead of city name
TripBuilder.jsx line 190: handleChangeRoom(cityIndex) correctly uses cityIndex instead of city name
TripBuilder.jsx line 433: generateItinerary() correctly passes cityIndex to each day object
TripBuilder.jsx line 1196: selectedHotels[cityIndex] correctly retrieves hotel by index
TripBuilder.jsx line 1369: Add Hotel button uses data-testid='add-hotel-{cityIndex}' for each section
TripBuilder.jsx line 1449-1460: Trip Summary correctly resolves city names from cities[parseInt(cityIdx)]

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All multi-city hotel selection features working correctly

seed_data_creation: Used existing hotels in Tbilisi: Horizont Hotel Tbilisi (AED 180-257), Iveria Inn Hotel (AED 180)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-city hotel selection bug fix verified. Key data-testids: add-hotel-{n} for Add Hotel buttons, change-hotel-{n} and change-room-{n} for Change buttons. selectedHotels state is now keyed by cityIndex (0, 1, 2...) instead of city name. Test flow: Login > Book FIT Package > Add 3 cities (Tbilisi, Gudauri, Tbilisi) > Create Proposal > Verify 3 hotel sections > Select hotel for one Tbilisi > Verify other Tbilisi still shows 'No Hotel Selected'.
